description_long: This is a decorative wall clock crafted from light-colored wood, featuring a playful and artistic arrangement of oversized Arabic numerals that appear to cascade around the circular clock face. The numerals are cut out from the same wooden material, giving the clock a sculptural and cohesive appearance. The clock face itself is minimal, with no additional markings or decorations, and the hands are simple and black, standing out against the wood. The back of the clock reveals a standard battery-operated mechanism, indicating it is powered by a typical quartz movement. The overall design is modern and whimsical, making it a striking accent piece. Its construction is relatively thin, as seen from the side views, emphasizing its suitability for wall mounting.
description: A whimsical wall clock made of light wood, with large, artistically arranged cut-out Arabic numerals and simple black hands. The design is modern and sculptural, ideal as a decorative accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the artistic arrangement of large, cut-out wooden numerals and the black clock hands on a plain circular face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the clock's thin profile and layered wooden construction, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment and clock mechanism, as well as the reverse side of the cut-out numerals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the clock's slim, flat structure with alternating wood grain patterns.
attribute_face_design: Circular wooden face with large, cut-out numerals arranged in an artistic, overlapping pattern; no additional markings or decorations.
